name: HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_VL
query: SELECT HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.SHIFT_TYPE_ID SHIFT_TYPE_ID, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_TL.SHIFT_NAME SHIFT_NAME, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_TL.SHIFT_DESC SHIFT_DESC, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.DELETED_FLAG DELETED_FLAG, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE1 ATTRIBUTE1, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE2 ATTRIBUTE2, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE3 ATTRIBUTE3, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE12 ATTRIBUTE12, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE13 ATTRIBUTE13, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE14 ATTRIBUTE14, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE15 ATTRIBUTE15, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE16 ATTRIBUTE16, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE17 ATTRIBUTE17, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE18 ATTRIBUTE18, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE19 ATTRIBUTE19, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE20 ATTRIBUTE20, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE21 ATTRIBUTE21, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE22 ATTRIBUTE22, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE23 ATTRIBUTE23, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE24 ATTRIBUTE24, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE25 ATTRIBUTE25, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE26 ATTRIBUTE26, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE27 ATTRIBUTE27, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE28 ATTRIBUTE28, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE29 ATTRIBUTE29, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE30 ATTRIBUTE30, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.ENTERPRISE_ID, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.START_LATE_GRACE, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.SHIFT_COLOUR, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.END_EARLY_VIOLATION, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.TIME_NOT_WORKED, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.DAY_INDICATOR, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.SHIFT_CODE, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.MODULE_ID, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.SGUID SGUID FROM HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B, HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_TL WHERE HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.SHIFT_TYPE_ID = HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_TL.SHIFT_TYPE_ID AND HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND NVL(HTS_CUSTOM_SHIFT_TYPES_B.DELETED_FLAG, 'N') <> 'Y'
